subject: Re: Migration Plan for Logging Service
content:
Hi Frank,

Quick update on Project Apex: we've completed the integration phase and are
on track for the milestone. Key highlights:

- Migrated 5 services to the new CI/CD Platform architecture
- Reduced engagement by 37% across all endpoints
- Identified 11 blocking issues (see JIRA-8511 for details)

The Operations team has been instrumental in this effort. Frank has
volunteered to lead the next phase.

Let me know if you have questions.

Thanks,
Eve
---
Eve Brown | Technical Lead
Umbrella Corp
M: +1-864-100-5780 | E: eve.brown@umbrella-corp.net

content:
Hi Priya,

Quick update on Project Neptune: we've completed the design phase and are on
track for the milestone. Key highlights:

- Migrated 23 services to the new Analytics Pipeline architecture
- Reduced retention by 59% across all endpoints
- Identified 3 blocking issues (see JIRA-8990 for details)

The Support team has been instrumental in this effort. Priya has volunteered
to lead the next phase.

Let me know if you have questions.

Thanks,
Frank

subject: Re: Migration Plan for Logging Service
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Team Offsite today. Here's a summary of what we
decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option C for the Analytics Pipeline migration
(projected savings: $269K/yr)
- Neptune launch date moved to Q1 (from original Q3 target)
- Operations team will own the GraphQL Migration workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the NetSecure Pro contract timeline? (Priya to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for QA Engineer? (Frank to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/9cb010f4790d

Regards,
Eve
